title: OIDC Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Omnibus Industrial Development Corporation (OIDC) Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website oidc.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the OIDC Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation shall be given to eligible candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Commerce, Chartered Accountant, ICWA, or MBA in Finance. Minimum 5 years of experience.
qualification.details: Chief Financial Officer (CFO): Degree in Commerce from a recognized university. Chartered Accountant or ICWA or M.B.A in Finance from a Govt. recognized university. Minimum five years of working experience in the field of Finance with any Government Company/PSUs/Private listed good reputed Company registered under the Companies Act.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OIDC Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OIDC CFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the offline application for the OIDC Chief Financial Officer (CFO) position is 02-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the CFO post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post will receive a salary of Rs. 106000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the CFO role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Commerce, or be a Chartered Accountant, ICWA, or hold an MBA in Finance from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the CFO post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this OIDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required work experience for the CFO position?
faq.answer: A minimum of five years of working experience in the field of Finance with a Government Company, PSU, or a reputed private listed company is required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the OIDC CFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post will primarily involve Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Omnibus Industrial Development Corporation (OIDC).
